What We Offer

Medical Weight Management

Structured, provider-led programs for adults seeking clinical weight management. Each plan is developed from a thorough medical consultation and tailored to your health history, goals, and eligibility.

01

GLP-1 Medications

Semaglutide or Tirzepatide when clinically appropriate, prescribed following a full medical evaluation. All treatment decisions are individualized. Results vary.

02

Individualized Care Plans

Programs built around your medical history, lifestyle, and weight-loss goals — not generic templates.

03

Telehealth Follow-Ups

Follow-up visits available for established patients throughout Florida — convenient and fully supervised.

04

Ongoing Medical Monitoring

Continued clinical oversight and direct provider access throughout your entire program.

Meet Your Provider

Expert Care, Directly Delivered

All consultations are conducted by a licensed Physician Assistant (PA-C) with over 15 years of clinical experience in emergency medicine. Care is delivered in accordance with applicable clinical standards, with direct access to your provider throughout your program.

⚕

Emergency Medicine Background

Over 15 years of high-acuity clinical experience informing a safety-focused approach.

💬

Direct Provider Communication

Reach your provider directly for questions, follow-up, and ongoing care coordination.

🌐

English & French Services

Bilingual care for clear communication with a diverse South Florida patient community.

🔒

Confidential & Professional

Judgment-free environment with strict patient privacy at every stage of care.

Why Choose Us

A Different Experience

Clinical expertise with radical transparency — no hidden fees, no pressure, no insurance needed.

Take the first step toward structured, provider-guided weight management — with no contracts and no insurance needed.

Book Free Consultation
🩺
Provider-Led Care

Every aspect of your care is led by a licensed Physician Assistant, not a wellness coach or general staff.

💳
No Insurance Required

Access medical weight loss without navigating insurance. Pricing discussed openly during your consultation.

📝
No Long-Term Contracts

Begin or stop care on your own terms, guided by your provider's recommendations and personal goals.

💡
Transparent Process

Clear information on all costs, programs, and expectations before you commit to anything.

🌍
Bilingual Support

Services in English and French so every patient communicates comfortably with their provider.

🔗
Referral Program

Participate with a unique referral link — open to anyone, no patient status required.

Getting Started

Your Path, Step by Step

1

Register Online

Complete your secure patient intake form to begin the process at your own pace.

2

Free Consultation

Meet your licensed PA-C for a confidential, no-obligation visit. Ask any questions you have.

3

Personalized Plan

Receive a treatment plan built around your health history, goals, and clinical eligibility.

4

Ongoing Support

Direct provider access for monitoring, follow-up, and continued care throughout your journey.
